props.name: className
props.comment: Extra CSS class appended to the underlying menu button.

props.name: icon
props.comment: Override the icon. Defaults to the resource icon or `<List />`.

props.name: label
props.comment: Override the label. Defaults to the pluralised resource label.

props.name: name
props.comment:
The resource name (matches the `name` of a `<Resource>` registered in `<Admin>`).
Used to look up the resource definition, label, icon and list path.

props.name: onClick
props.comment:
Click handler invoked after the default navigation. The default
`<AppSidebar>` uses this to close the mobile drawer.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.comment:
Extra props spread onto the underlying `<SidebarMenuButton>` (e.g. tooltip
config, `dense`). Forwarded via the `...rest` spread.
